matched_to: tour operators and travel advisors specializing in sports tourism, golf, and active travel

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director
leads.company_description: EPL Sports Tours is a UK-based tour operator specializing in custom-made sports tours for clubs, teams, athletes, and families. They provide comprehensive travel packages including professional training sessions, competitive matches, stadium tours, and logistics for clients of all ages and skill levels.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director at Venatour Ltd
leads.company_address: Venatour Ltd 1st Floor Aviation House SE2A Gloucestershire Airport , Cheltenham, England, GB, GL51 6SP
leads.company_description: Venatour Sports Travel is a UK-based tour operator that provides bespoke sports travel packages for individual and group travelers. They specialize in organizing tours across various disciplines, including rugby, cricket, horse racing, golf, and Formula 1, while managing event tickets, accommodation, and flight arrangements.

leads.title: Owner
leads.company_description: Club Aventure is a Canadian tour operator with 38 years in business, offering small-group adventure tours focused on cycling, hiking, and cultural experiences. Their destinations include the Camino de Santiago in Galicia, Patagonia, and destinations across Europe and South America.

leads.title: Director
leads.headline: Director At Burleigh Travel Limited
leads.company_description: Burleigh Travel Limited is a UK-based tour operator specializing in the organization of sports tours across multiple disciplines, including football and hockey. Based in Cheltenham, the company serves sports clubs and teams by arranging comprehensive travel and competitive sporting experiences.

leads.title: Owner
leads.company_description: Executive Golf & Leisure is a UK-based operator with over 36 years of experience creating luxury golf tours and corporate events. They serve international clients with bespoke packages including accommodation, private ground or air transportation, and a dedicated tour coordinator.

leads.title: Owner
leads.company_description: Those Travel Guys is a UK-based independent tour operator specializing in golf and wellness holidays for both individual and group travelers. They arrange FIT packages, corporate incentive trips, meetings, and holistic retreats centered on golf, sports, and wellness themes.

leads.title: Business Owner
leads.company_address: Suite 2, Millennium House, Eden St, Kingston upon Thames, Surrey KT1 1HH, GB
leads.company_description: Latin Routes Limited is a UK-based tour operator specializing in tailor-made holidays to Latin America. The company provides personalized itineraries crafted by travel specialists, offering handpicked accommodations and exclusive experiences supported by local partners.

leads.title: Owner
leads.company_description: Humble Travel is a US-based luxury travel agency and founding Virtuoso member since 1986, specializing in leisure, corporate, group, and incentive travel. Their featured destinations include Europe (Spain, Portugal, Italy), Mexico, the Caribbean, and beyond.

leads.title: Founder, President & Visionary
leads.headline: Global Luxury Journey Designer, Entrepreneur, Industry Leader | Advisor | Serandipians | Destinations | Hotels | Rail | Experiences | Trade
leads.company: CTN Family of Brands | Custom Travel Network | Custom Train Journeys | African Voyager
leads.company_address: 30211 Avenida De Las Banderas, Suite 200, Rancho Santa Margarita, CA 92688, US
leads.company_description: CTN is a US-based hybrid travel firm that functions as a custom journey planner, wholesale tour operator, and on-site management provider. They deliver tailored trip consulting and authentic travel experiences to clients, including travel agents and individual travelers, by focusing on specific needs and requirements.

leads.title: Owner, Destination Manager
leads.headline: Destination Manager at Fleewinter
leads.company_address: 49 stile hall gardens, london, greater london, united kingdom
leads.company_description: Fleewinter is an independent tour operator and boutique travel advisor that provides tailor-made holiday itineraries across more than 60 global destinations. Utilizing a distributed team of specialists, they offer personalized services including the curation of boutique accommodation and private transfers.
